description.p: Dusk Studio is a deliberately constrained, portastudio-style digital audio workstation. Fixed 24-channel topology with a fixed signal chain (HPF, 4-band EQ, FET/Opto compressor, sends, pan, mute/solo, fader), four aux buses, and a mastering chain with passive program EQ, bus compressor, tape saturation, and limiter.

Built for musicians who want to commit to sounds and finish songs instead of endlessly tweaking. Inspired by Tascam Portastudio hardware: every parameter is visible, no plugin chains, no bus reordering, no waveform-level editing.
Input monitoring now feeds aux sends during playback.
Beta patch: fixes a mixdown/stems/freeze crash with CLAP (and VST3/LV2) plugin inserts.
Beta patch: live play-along during playback, Mackie fader calibration, Windows plugin-scan sandbox fix, deterministic bounces.

Beta. Workflow: session sample-rate policy, seamless loop playback, Save As consolidation, aux return latency compensation, MIDI soft takeover, LV2 file state in sessions, delivery presets, and background audio imports. Sound: the console EQ on every channel and bus moves to a new-generation core with a subtle re-voicing, and the channel EQ and compressor path is lighter on the CPU. Launching on Wayland without XWayland now shows a clear message explaining how to enable it instead of crashing, and the MIDI engine internals have been modernised.

Patch release on the 0.11 Beta line. Chase / follow playhead in the timeline and editors, a bar / beat grid in the audio and MIDI editors, a reworked top-row layout with the stage selector in the menu row, and a keyboard-shortcut cleanup. Fixes a startup hang when the saved audio device is busy (falls back to another device with a notice) and an ALSA crash on interfaces with fewer than 32 channels. Adds a Raspberry Pi (arm64) Linux tarball.

Beta release. Optional out-of-process plugin sandbox with crash-isolated plugin scanning on all three OSes, automatic cross-track plugin delay compensation, broad undo coverage (notes, automation, tempo, renames), tempo editing from the ruler, portable session folders, MIDI Learn for EQ frequency/Q, multi-output cue routing, true-peak mastering limiter, and a data-integrity and real-time-safety hardening pass (atomic session save, autosave recovery, MIDI-out xruns, crash fixes on stop and quit).

First beta. MIDI binding targets across the mixer, screen-reader accessibility for the channel strips, audio-device hot-unplug recovery, macOS out-of-process plugin pipeline with in-process editors, and Linux arm64 builds.

Beta release leading up to 1.0. Phase 4 MIDI tempo retime, BPM-change confirmation dialog, 64-sample raised-cosine punch crossfade, triplet quantize variants, and packaging targets for Linux AppImage / deb / rpm, Windows MSI, macOS DMG.
